LOGIN.PATREON_HINT: get a colored nickname and other bonuses for patrons
LOGIN.EMAIL_HINT_REGISTER: enter your email and password for registration
LOGIN.REMEMBER_HINT: check the "remember me" box for automatic authorization
LOGIN.REGISTER_HINT: click "register now" to create a new account

skillsMenu.resetConfirmation: If you click "Yes", all learned trades will be completely reset and you will receive half of the spent experience back. You will also lose all learned spells.
skillsMenu.memoryHint: Memory is required to learn new skills
skillsMenu.experienceHint: Experience can be used to improve skills

adminDashboard.title: SkyMP Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.subtitle: Live server status and player controls

adminDashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by ID, name or IP…

adminDashboard.logsDisabled: Log access is disabled for your role
adminDashboard.metricsDisabled: Metrics access is disabled for your role

serverList.title: Server Browser
serverList.subtitle: Choose a server and start your adventure
serverList.versionMismatch: Version mismatch — server may be incompatible

miner.name: Miner
miner.description: Miner: mines ore, gems, and minerals
levels: You are no star of the trade, but with a bit of luck you might chip out a few lumps of iron ore. Quicksilver or corundum are well beyond you.
You have learned how to handle a pickaxe. That does not make you a master, but it is a start. You can mine iron well enough, and that is the most common metal there is.
You could say you have made a name for yourself in the mines. Now you can work corundum and quicksilver, and you have learned the first law of orichalcum mining: do not get caught by the Orcs.
You have learned to tell moonstone from lesser rock. Rare metals like gold and silver demand real knowledge, and now you have it.
Your beard is fuller, your wool collar sits higher, and every stone in every forgotten ravine whispers to you. You know how to pull something precious from the earth, perhaps even ebony.

fishman.name: Angler
levels: You know what a fishing rod is, and you know bait goes on the hook. You even know to cast and watch the float, but does that guarantee a catch? Hardly.
You have learned the basics of fishing and now know that river fish are best taken with a bee or a luna moth wing.
After long journeys and endless hours by the water, you have learned that lake fish love dragonflies, while fish in dungeons will bite almost any bait with greedy enthusiasm.
You are already a seasoned angler and know that sea fish bite well on blue butterflies and monarchs. You have also long since noticed that predatory fish in any waters will snap at a fighting fish.
You catch fish like a master. Many think you are simply lucky. You know better: the right place, the right bait, and steady hands matter far more.

saltmaker.name: Saltmaker
saltmaker.description: Saltmaker: digs clay and salt, and crafts glassware and pottery
levels: When an employer asks what you can do, you usually say: dig clay. If he asks what else you can do, after a pause you answer: well... not dig clay.
You are a true wonder-worker. With a shovel and a little grit, you can make pots from clay, glass from sand, and salt from seawater.
You have become skilled at smelting glass and can blow more intricate vessels. Your knack for digging in the right place also helps you uncover valuable nuggets along muddy riverbanks.
Being practical and sharp-minded, you do not dream of magical miracles. You simply know how to improve your work so you do less and get more.
Among craftsmen, stories are told of your luck and astonishing productivity. You are now a true master of the trade, and your shovel deserves a bust cast in gold.

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.description: Hunter: hunts wild animals for pelts and meat
levels: Hunting is no simple affair, especially for a beginner. There is far too much to know if you want to catch clever rabbits or mudcrabs.
You have learned the basics of the hunter's trade, but you still lack practice, so you often ruin pelts and ingredients when field-dressing a carcass.
You have hunted long enough to learn how to draw out the choicest ingredients, but you are still not careful enough when skinning away from a proper butcher's table.
You are an experienced hunter. Your prey grows larger, and your skill at dressing carcasses is good enough to keep you far from town for long stretches.
You know where to find rare beasts and how to bring them down. You no longer make mistakes when skinning pelts or harvesting valuable ingredients.

doctor.name: Herbalist
doctor.description: Herbalist: gathers herbs, mushrooms, and berries
levels: Perhaps all your knowledge of plants comes from your grandmother's tales about edible berries. Your last stomach ache has given you reason to doubt her wisdom.
The Barbarian's Primer helped you identify a few plants. Now you know how to pick a bellflower without attracting the attention of minotaurs.
You have always liked mushrooms, just not gathering them. Time to change that. You know a fair bit about fungi now, and can easily tell which one poisoned you yesterday.
Your wandering through forests, fields, and caves was not in vain. You know herbs, berries, and mushrooms well, and even have a few secret spots of your own, the pride of any herbalist.
You have reached the height of herbal mastery. You can tell one plant from another at a glance, even from afar. Your clothes smell of flowers, which is more than can be said for Telvanni bug musk.

woodcutter.name: Woodcutter
woodcutter.description: Woodcutter: harvests timber, fells trees, and chops firewood
levels: You can snap poles and strip bark from trunks, but even children can do that. You can hold an axe, though it seems determined to find your leg.

You have learned the basics of chopping wood and felling trees properly. Your companions no longer need to fear a spruce landing on their heads. You have also more or less learned how to burn charcoal.
You have mastered the finer points of charcoal-making and learned how to make potash. Your skill in wood harvesting has improved greatly.
Day by day you grow more experienced in your trade. You have become much stronger, and splitting a woodpile three cubits high is nothing to you now.
You have reached the peak of mastery. The axe cuts through wood like butter, and your hands know no fatigue. You are strong, tireless, and worthy of a wooden medal.

bee.name: Beekeeper
bee.description: Beekeeper: breeds bees and harvests honey
levels: If there is no honey in the hive, then the wrong bees made it. At least that is what you tell yourself. These savage little beasts have stung you more than once, but you still managed to steal a bit of honey.
You know a little more about bees now and have even realized that peeking into a hive is not enough. You have also learned how to make wax from honeycomb.
You know how to breed bees and slip prepared wax sheets into frames inside the hive. Who would have thought this is much easier than robbing wild hives?
Your apiary grows more productive, and you know how to handle these small, charming creatures that bring such a valuable gift.
You have reached the height of mastery in beekeeping and know how to breed and feed bees. You have perfected the processing of honeycomb and the making of wax sheets.

farmer.name: Farmer
farmer.description: Farmer: grows and harvests vegetables, and raises chickens and cows
levels: You know how to dig up potatoes. You do know how, right?
A farmer has many tasks: tending crops, milking cows, feeding chickens, gathering eggs, hauling manure, and filling the cellar for winter. You can do all of that, just not particularly well.
Cheese and butter production is growing, your crops are thriving, milk yields are climbing, and the hens are laying like mad. A fine little idyll built by your labor.
You have learned many clever tricks and uncommon methods. Bigger harvests are everything to you. The main thing is keeping tramps out of the field, since they ruin more than they steal.
Your parents envy your success as a farmer. You are a master beyond doubt. And if your parents do not envy you, someone else's surely does. Truth be told, everyone does.

armor.name: Armorer
levels: You know little of smithing, but you do have some idea how to forge useful tools such as picks, axes, shovels, and the like.
Your hands are black and your apron is full of soot. You have learned to work iron, split metal, and smelt it. Forging simple blanks is no trouble for you anymore.
This month you learned to work with alloys. You can now use steel, moonstone, and silver.
You have become an experienced armorer. New alloys reveal themselves to you: quicksilver and gilded elven metal.

A master armorer can work with anything, and there is no material beyond your skill. It is time to master the techniques of your own people. You have also learned to work from Dwemer recipes that adventurers drag out of old ruins.

weapon.name: Weaponsmith
levels: You know little of smithing, but you do have some idea how to forge useful tools such as picks, axes, shovels, and the like.
Your hands are black and your apron is full of soot. You have learned to work iron, split metal, and smelt it. Forging simple blanks is no trouble for you anymore.
This month you learned to work with alloys. You can now use steel, moonstone, and silver.
You have become an experienced weaponsmith. New alloys reveal themselves to you: quicksilver and gilded elven metal.

A master weaponsmith can work with anything, and there is no material beyond your skill. It is time to master the techniques of your own people. You have also learned to work from Dwemer recipes that adventurers bring back from ruins.

jewelry.name: Jeweler
levels: Sigurd, you are a jeweler. That is what people say of someone capable of truly delicate work, though it does not quite apply to you.
You can do a little. String together beads from bits of wood, tie a cheap shiny stone to a thread, things like that. The height of your craft is a divine amulet.
Using clay molds, you cast metal for amulets, rings, circlets, and candlesticks. You can also draw wire fine enough to make respectable chains.
Your skill keeps growing. You use a cutting wheel with ease now, and can set certain precious stones into your elegant metalwork.
You are a master, what more is there to say? You can forge and polish any piece to a fine gleam. You take pride in jewels set with rare stones whose cuts you have perfected.

leather.name: Furrier
leather.description: Furrier: works leather and makes leather goods
levels: You can scrape a thin hide clean of flesh and cut leather into strips or laces without making too much of a mess, but everything else is a dark forest to you.
You have spent a great deal of time combing and treating furs. From now on, you can make fur armor and other goods from the material.
You have mastered the basics: rawhide, tawed leather, and even proper tanning. Your work is no longer limited to armor. You make excellent backpacks, bags, and boots.
You have learned to make complex leather goods and handle materials that are very easy to ruin. You have also mastered dyeing different kinds of leather.
You can craft the finest and most intricate goods of all. Legends are told of the quality of your leather, and jarls and their courtiers proudly wear your furs.

clother.name: Tailor
clother.description: Tailor: sews all manner of clothing
levels: You know that linen in Skyrim is made from mountain flower, a close cousin of flax. That is where your knowledge of weaving ends.
You have learned to process mountain flower into linen thread, work with dye, and weave linen cloth. You can sew simple linen garments.
You have learned to work fleece and tundra cotton, producing wool and cotton and making woolen and cotton cloth. You can sew simple cotton and mixed-fabric garments.
You have mastered most techniques of clothwork, including more complex dyeing. You make active use of furs and many different kinds of material.
You have mastered the treatment of every kind of fabric and know how to combine them. Your skill has grown so great that nobles and jarls are willing to buy your clothes.

carpenter.name: Carpenter
carpenter.description: Carpenter: crafts wooden goods, bows, shields, and crossbows
levels: The neighbor taught his boy to make stools, so why should you be any worse? You can make a decent axe handle or a shovel shaft.
Excellent. You have learned to make something useful. Now you can craft training weapons for warriors and decent walking staves for mages and travelers.
Your carpentry is at a solid basic level. You know how to work wood for bows, shields, battle staves, and simple crossbows.
Your mastery keeps growing. You have learned to make weapons with metal fittings: bows, shields, and crossbows. You have also mastered carving not just in wood, but in bone as well.
Master bowyer is a title you may wear with pride. Your bows and crossbows are powerful, made from the finest wood, and may even bear a special feature: a sight.

somelie.name: Brewer
somelie.description: Brewer: brews mead and makes wine
levels: This profession is still under development. Look for another path, or wait until it is fully implemented.
This profession is still under development. Look for another path, or wait until it is fully implemented.
You are growing more experienced and know how to work with vintage meads and wines, though now and then you still lose a batch or two to poor storage or some other mistake.
Only half a step remains before you can rightly call yourself a master. You can produce any drink, and sometimes true alcoholic masterpieces leave your hands.
You have become a true master of the craft and learned to produce the rarest spirits in quantity. Your drink has excellent flavor and is valued even beyond Skyrim.

chief.name: Cook
levels: You can roast a stinkhorn over the fire and slice some cheese. What more does a common laborer need?
You have learned to make simple pastries. Your bread comes out crisp and tender, and roasted meat no longer looks like a lump of charcoal from the fire.
Your list of signature dishes keeps growing. You can now cook meat and fish well, and know a thousand and one ways to make soup. You do not mind mushrooms on the coals either.
You have learned to make the favorite food of children and the secret weakness of adults: sweet rolls and a few other treats. You also know how to cook horker and rare fish.
You have reached the height of culinary art. The serving staff call you Chef, and your knowledge of rare dishes and refined appetizers makes other cooks green with envy.

daggers.name: Assassin
daggers.description: Assassin: specializes in daggers and stealth
levels: When you were a child, someone gave you a knife. It was small and dull, much like you.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you are graceful, quick, and know how to move through stealth with ease.
Who said the left hand is less deft than the right? You have trained enough to use both hands effectively.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. Every dagger technique is now open to you, and you have reached the highest level of mastery with this weapon.

shortswords.name: Scout
shortswords.description: Scout: specializes in short blades and stealth
levels: You could never quite decide whether it was a large dagger or a small sword.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you are graceful, quick, and know how to move through stealth with ease.
Who said the left hand is less deft than the right? You have trained enough to use both hands effectively.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. Every technique with short blades is now open to you, and you have reached the highest level of mastery with this weapon.

swords.name: Knight
levels: The best spell against an unpleasant meeting is a double-edged sword.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
Who said the left hand is less deft than the right? You have trained enough to use both hands effectively.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. Every technique with the one-handed sword is now open to you, and you have reached the highest level of mastery with this weapon.

scimitar.name: Forerunner
scimitar.description: Forerunner: specializes in weapon types rare in Skyrim, sabers and scimitars
levels: They have curved swords. Curved. Swords.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
Who said the left hand is less deft than the right? You have trained enough to use both hands effectively.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. Every technique with sabers and scimitars is now open to you, and you have reached the highest level of mastery with this weapon.

katana.name: Spy
katana.description: Spy: specializes in weapon types rare in Skyrim, katana, tanto, and wakizashi
levels: Your mentor told you to stay well away from wild Nords, so what exactly are you doing in Skyrim?
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
Who said the left hand is less deft than the right? You have trained enough to use both hands effectively.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. Every technique with the katana is now open to you, and you have reached the highest level of mastery with this weapon.

mace.name: Rogue
mace.description: Rogue: specializes in clubs and maces
levels: Why bother trying to stab someone when you can simply give them a proper crack across the head?
You have trained long and hard, and your basic attacks with the club are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
You have trained long and hard, and your basic attacks with the mace are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
You have trained enough to use both hands effectively, and your special techniques are no longer something to be ashamed of in public.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. Every technique with clubs, hand axes, and maces is now open to you, and you have reached the highest level of mastery with this weapon.

axes.name: Berserker
levels: In ancient times, some unknown force split all creation in two with an axe, though nobody seems inclined to believe your story.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
Who said the left hand is less deft than the right? You have trained enough to use both hands effectively.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. Every technique with the one-handed axe is now open to you, and you have reached the highest level of mastery with this weapon.

hammer.name: Bruiser
levels: One day you realized your fingers and a hammer are best friends, at least until nails get involved.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
Who said the left hand is less deft than the right? You have trained enough to use both hands effectively.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. Every technique with the one-handed hammer is now open to you, and you have reached the highest level of mastery with this weapon.

bows.name: Marksman
bows.description: Marksman: specializes in bows and crossbows
levels: Anyone can string a bow. Shooting it well is another matter.
Hours spent lying in ambush among the bushes are not wasted. They teach you to aim well and loose a killing shot.
Your eyesight sharpens with practice. Squint hard enough, and you can make out objects at astonishing distance, a feat not given to everyone.
Your dexterity lets you draw arrows from the quiver far faster than any novice ever could.
To be a master means knowing your bow so well that you can still move quickly even with the string drawn.

longsword.name: Swordsman
levels: They are not really greatswords, they are longswords, though some of them are quite great. Let us not argue over size.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
You have grown stronger and learned every kind of combat technique, but some of them are still difficult to execute even now.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. You move lightly and without effort, and what once felt like a difficult trick has become an ordinary technique. That is what mastery is.

greatkatana.name: Blade
greatkatana.description: Blade: specializes in giant katana, the nodachi
levels: The art of wielding the nodachi was lost long ago. Perhaps a few old Dunmer still remember those spectacular techniques, but sadly this weapon is unlikely ever to return to tradition.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
You have grown stronger and learned every kind of combat technique, but some of them are still difficult to execute even now.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. You move lightly and without effort, and what once felt like a difficult trick has become an ordinary technique. That is what mastery is.

battleaxe.name: Slasher
battleaxe.description: Slasher: specializes in two-handed axes and war axes
levels: People speak of men like you and say: now there goes a real slasher.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
You have grown stronger and learned every kind of combat technique, but some of them are still difficult to execute even now.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. You move lightly and without effort, and what once felt like a difficult trick has become an ordinary technique. That is what mastery is.

warhammer.name: Crusher
levels: A hammer is a versatile thing. Good for smashing a few skulls or driving a bolt, and just about anything else besides.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
You have grown stronger and learned every kind of combat technique, but some of them are still difficult to execute even now.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. You move lightly and without effort, and what once felt like a difficult trick has become an ordinary technique. That is what mastery is.

staff.name: Monk
levels: There are times when all you want is a sturdy stick and a broad back to lay it across.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
You have grown stronger and learned every kind of combat technique, but some of them are still difficult to execute even now.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. You move lightly and without effort, and what once felt like a difficult trick has become an ordinary technique. That is what mastery is.

pike.name: Spearfighter
pike.description: Spearfighter: wields one-handed spears, two-handed pikes, and exotic tridents
levels: Not the flashiest weapon, perhaps, but a very effective one for those who prefer to strike from afar.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
You have grown stronger and learned every kind of combat technique, but some of them are still difficult to execute even now.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. You move lightly and without effort, and what once felt like a difficult trick has become an ordinary technique. That is what mastery is.

halberd.name: Warden
halberd.description: Warden: specializes in halberds and can also master exotic glaives
levels: I have a spear, I have a battle axe... hmm... a halberd.
You have trained long and hard, and your most basic attacks are second nature now, but your special techniques still look rather ridiculous.
It did not take long before you mastered special techniques. Now you move with grace, and your duels are worth watching with undisguised interest.
You have grown stronger and learned every kind of combat technique, but some of them are still difficult to execute even now.
Years of relentless training do not go to waste. You move lightly and without effort, and what once felt like a difficult trick has become an ordinary technique. That is what mastery is.

armorlight.name: Infantryman
levels: You have put on armor for the first time. It is uncomfortable, and far too hot inside.
Armor no longer feels quite so uncomfortable, especially after you asked a smith to fit it to your frame. It hinders your movement far less now.
Long use has hardened your body to the burden. You no longer feel its weight, and moving while blocking an enemy's blows gives you no trouble at all.

armorheavy.name: Plate Warrior
levels: You have put on armor for the first time. It is uncomfortable, pinches under the arms, and chafes your neck.
Armor no longer feels quite so uncomfortable, especially after you asked a smith to fit it to your frame. Falls from a height no longer seem nearly so painful.
Long use has hardened your body to the burden. You no longer feel its weight, and moving while blocking an enemy's blows gives you no trouble at all.

shield.name: Shieldbearer
shield.description: Shieldbearer: specializes in fighting with a shield
levels: You can hold a shield, thank the gods. It is heavy and not especially comfortable, so you had better train.
You have mastered one of the shieldbearer's most important techniques: the shield bash. It takes a lot of strength, but the results are well worth the effort.
Regular training with the shield has not only strengthened your confidence in battle, but also toughened your body enough to run with your shield held high in pride.
You have grown so used to your shield, its weight, and its size, that blocking no longer slows your movements.
Mastery comes with time. After long hours of training, you discovered that at the right angle you can even block the spells of not particularly clever creatures.

alchemy.name: Alchemist
alchemy.description: Alchemist: brews potions, mixes dyes, and applies healing bandages
levels: Your knowledge of alchemy begins and ends with standing at an alchemy table and tapping a pestle against an empty mortar while looking wise.
You have mastered the basics of potion-making and can brew the weakest versions of the most common potions. You have also learned to make healing bandages and simple dyes.
You have learned to brew remedies for every common disease in Skyrim, and mastered stronger versions of other potions as well as concentrated dyes.
You have expanded your arsenal of magical effects through experiments with ingredients, giving you more ways to brew the very same potion.
Years of practice have raised your skill to remarkable heights. You can now brew perfect health and stamina restoratives, along with many other potions besides.

conjuration.name: Conjurer
conjuration.description: Conjurer: practices the magic of the Conjuration school
levels: At present, this profession only allows you to conjure weapons, so running about with a ghost wolf is out of the question.
You have mastered the basics of Conjuration and can now summon a dagger or a staff. For now, that is all your persistence can manage.
You have mastered a new degree of Conjuration, and your spell list has expanded. You can now summon a katana and a bow, and the power of all conjured weapons has noticeably increased.
Your studies are bearing more and more fruit, and have made you an expert. You have mastered the summoning of spear, battleaxe, and halberd, and every conjured weapon in your hands grows deadlier.
You have become a master of Conjuration. The weapons you summon now reveal their full, dreadful potential, and their ranks are joined by conjured armor, shield, and sword.

enchant.name: Enchanter
enchant.description: Enchanter: enchants all manner of items
levels: Enchanting is a difficult magical discipline, and all you know of it is rumor and hearsay.
You have learned to enchant simple battle staves. It is hardly the height of the craft, but everyone starts somewhere.
Your skill is growing, and now you can enchant true magical staves that focus a mage's power and even cast a pleasant glow in the dark.
With each passing day of practice, your craft becomes more useful. You have learned to enchant battle staves made from costly materials and precious jewelry.
Gray hair and a beard are the faithful companions of masters. You can now enchant the rarest staves and the finest jewels, and magical items in your hands lose their charge more slowly.

alteration.name: Mystic
alteration.description: Mystic: practices the magic of the Alteration school
levels: This profession already has several working spells, but it is still in development. If you enjoy playing a mage on little more than dice and nerve, feel free to take it.
You have mastered the basics of Alteration and can now learn apprentice spells. You also gain the Candlelight spell.
You have mastered the next tier of Alteration and can now learn more advanced adept spells, such as Detect Dead and Water Breathing.
You have become an expert in Alteration and are now skilled enough to learn spells such as Detect Life and Water Walking.
You have reached mastery in Alteration and command this school to perfection.

destruction.name: Sorcerer
destruction.description: Sorcerer: practices the magic of the Destruction school
levels: You know there are mages out there, and they do magic. Frightening thought.
You have grown stronger in the basics of Destruction and can now learn apprentice spells like Snowball. You also gain the Flash spell.
You have mastered the next tier of Destruction, your spells hit harder, and you can now learn adept spells such as Fire Arrow.
You have become an expert in Destruction. Your spells are deadlier still, and your experience will help you master dangerous expert spells like Fireball. You also gain the Fire Arrow spell.
You have reached mastery in Destruction. Your spells have opened up their full potential, and now you can learn the most dangerous among them, such as Comet and Cyclone.

illusion.name: Illusionist
illusion.description: Illusionist: practices the magic of the Illusion school
levels: This profession already has several working spells, but it is still in development. If you enjoy playing a mage on little more than dice and nerve, feel free to take it.
You have grasped the basics of Illusion and can now learn apprentice spells.
You have mastered the next tier of Illusion and can now learn adept spells.
You have mastered the next tier of Illusion and can now learn expert spells.
You have reached mastery in Illusion magic and command this school to perfection.

restoration.name: Healer
restoration.description: Healer: practices the magic of the Restoration school
levels: You know there are mages who can heal with a touch. Usually, they are found in temples.

You have learned the basics of Restoration and can now study apprentice spells such as Healing Hands. You also gain the Fast Healing spell and can examine the wounded to judge the severity of an injury.
The power of your spells has grown. They now restore more health, and you are ready to study adept spells such as Close Wounds and Healing Others, capable of mending severe injuries.
You have become an expert in Restoration, and the strength of your spells has increased further. You can now study expert spells such as Healing Aura Stream. You also gain the Healing Others spell.
You have reached mastery in Restoration, and your spells have revealed their full potential. You can now study master spells such as the Sphere of Grand Healing.
